title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.1219 - Cooperative not deemed a franchise
text:
351.1219.  Cooperative not deemed a franchise. — A cooperative formed under and operating in compliance with sections 351.1000 to 351.1228 shall not be deemed or construed to be a franchise under the laws of the state of Missouri.
(L. 2011 S.B. 366)
